title: Polio: global eradication, NAC and environmental surveillance
body: "Global Polio Eradication programme Information on the initiative created following the World Health Assembly’s 1988 resolution to eradicate poliomyelitis.  UK National Authority for Containment (NAC) Overview, background and membership of the UK NAC.  Environmental surveillance for polio Details of the environmental surveillance work being undertaken by the UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) as part of the commitment to Global Polio Eradication.  Potentially infectious materials (PIM) survey UKHSA, acting on behalf of the UK National Authority for Containment (UK NAC), is conducting a survey to ensure that all 4 UK countries meet the World Health Organization (WHO) requirements in relation to containment of poliovirus. The WHO Global Action Plan for Poliovirus Containment (GAPIV) outlines the technical standards and core activities necessary to sustain a polio-free world following global certification of wild poliovirus eradication. The invitation to participate includes information about the PIM survey.  "
